author: builder
summary: Completed the SQLite-to-Postgres data migration pipeline with FK audit, table copying, row verification, and rollback backup.

files_changed.description: Full migration pipeline: FK audit, table copy, verification, rollback backup, migration flag

pipeline_phases.phase_1_source_open: Open renamed SQLite as read-only source
pipeline_phases.phase_3_pg_connect: Connect to Postgres (PGlite path or pg Pool)
pipeline_phases.phase_4_copy: Copy all tables in dependency order (parents before children)
pipeline_phases.phase_5_verification: Compare row counts and SHA256 checksums between source and destination

acceptance_criteria_met.criterion: Data copied from SQLite to Postgres without data loss
acceptance_criteria_met.evidence: Verification phase compares row counts and SHA256 checksums for every table
renameForRollback renames .db to .db.pre-pg-migration before any write to PG

acceptance_criteria_met.criterion: Migration orders tables by dependency (parents before children)
acceptance_criteria_met.evidence: TABLE_ORDER defined with correct dependency order; unknown tables appended at end
verifyTableData checks per-table row counts AND SHA256 checksums

result.verification_method: Row count + SHA256 checksum for each of 15 tables
result.type_conversions: JSON columns parsed via JSON.parse(), boolean columns converted from 0/1
